channel.title: AR on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in AR on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Arkansas Department of Corrections (AR)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Arkansas Department of Corrections.

Model: JEM Signed: December 2, 2025 County: Pulaksi County State: AR FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Faulkner County Jail — Faulkner, AR
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Faulkner County Jail in Faulkner County, AR.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Lonoke Police Dept Det.Ctr — Lonoke, AR
